signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% | YES | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, up from prior months but below market forecasts of 2.4%[1][3].
